message:
test(beads): add 26 readiness resolver tests for DAG graph resolution (ft-1i2ge.2.1)

Covers empty input, single/multi node, blocker resolution, parent-child
non-blocking edges, diamond DAG, cycle detection, transitive depth,
fan-out, missing deps, dedup, sort ordering, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
